architecture_fit.note: One real attention layer, no MLP; minimal delta from base_model.py (RoPE -> one-hot positional subspace), diagonal emerges from softmax(q.k) not torch.eye.

baseline_comparison.note: Strawman head 7 (gain 0 -> uniform attention -> 0.25) baked into the same model, contrasted against head 0; also tracks the benchmark linear baseline.

faithfulness.note: Crisp causal ablation: zeroing the positional subspace (values untouched) collapses fidelity 1.0 -> 0.25, showing the copy is driven by positional routing.

operating_range.note: Full vocab sweep [0..255] all read 1.0 (token-agnostic by design); covers the defined axis but is flat with no probed breaking point.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Genuinely hand-set W_Q/W_K reading only position with per-head gain; reproduces identity copy exactly, strong evidence of mechanism understanding.

visual_judgement.note: Demo tab pairs per-head fidelity bar, diagonal-mass bar, grouped causal-ablation bars, and head-0 attention matrix — claim is legible without code.

visualisation_rationale.note: README 'Why this visualisation' ties each chart to a rubric item (baseline, faithfulness, operating range) with justified axes and contrasts.

notes: A clean, well-documented hand-built identity-copy head: a single real-attention layer whose Q/K read only a one-hot positional subspace, producing an emergent (softmax) diagonal that copies position-derived values at fidelity 1.0 against a built-in uniform-attention strawman. The standout is a crisp causal ablation that knocks out the positional routing while leaving values intact and watches fidelity collapse to the 0.25 baseline. Only weakness is operating range: the token sweep is flat 1.0 by construction and never probes a breaking point, but that axis is genuinely token-agnostic for a positional copier.
